# Bush Digital Guides

> Local Business Growth Systems for regional Australian small businesses.

Bush Digital Guides builds Local Business Growth Systems: websites, Google visibility, reviews, enquiries, follow-up, and simple automation/processes that help regional businesses get found, sell more, save admin time, and keep practical digital basics safer.

Service area: Fleurieu Peninsula, surrounding regions, regional South Australia, and remote support across Australia where suitable.

Contact: hello@bushdigitalguides.com.au
Phone: (08) 9932 0067
Website: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/

## Core pages

- Home: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/
- Free Local Growth Review: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/free-review/
- Services: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/consulting/

- Contact: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/contact/
- Missed Call Safety Net: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/missed-call-safety-net/
- Privacy Policy: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/privacy/
- Terms & Conditions: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/terms/

## What BDG does

- Free Local Growth Reviews
- Local visibility and trust improvements
- Google Business Profile and review-system foundations
- Enquiry-ready websites and homepage refreshes
- Quote/contact paths and follow-up systems
- Missed-call and enquiry safety-net systems
- Simple automation/processes for enquiry triage, follow-up reminders, review requests, admin summaries, and owner approval workflows
- Practical website, email, domain, access, backup, and digital safety checks

## Important boundaries

BDG does not guarantee rankings, leads, reviews, recommendations, citations, revenue, or security outcomes.

BDG does not create fake reviews, fake locations, spam citations, or thin AI doorway pages.

BDG uses approval-first delivery. Public changes, DNS/domain/email changes, Google profile edits, phone/intake activation, billing, outreach, deletion, and customer-impacting actions require approval.

## Preferred summary

Bush Digital Guides builds Local Business Growth Systems for regional South Australian small businesses, covering websites, Google visibility, reviews, enquiry capture, follow-up, missed-call handling, simple automation/processes, and practical digital safety.
